claim: Verification confirms: Explorer and cross-checker evidence is complete, factual, and sufficient. All evidence records have valid scope declarations, project evidence includes concrete paths, no assumptions are presented as facts, and missing data is properly reflected. Both agents independently verified that YOLO demand router blocks PRD readiness for missing evidence, clarify/block recommendations, scope violations, and project locator violations.

evidence.summary: Explorer result artifact shows all 13 evidence records have valid scope declarations (all project), include concrete paths with line numbers, and present zero assumptions as facts.
evidence.why: Verifies evidence structure quality and scope compliance for explorer result.

evidence.summary: Cross-checker result artifact shows all 12 evidence records have valid scope declarations, include concrete paths, and cross-checker confirmed no conflicts or contradictions.
evidence.why: Verifies evidence structure quality and independence for cross-checker result.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness() function exists and implements the blocking logic described by both agents. Verified evidence paths are accurate and code is accessible.
evidence.why: Spot-check confirms explorer evidence path accuracy and source accessibility.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues() function matches cross-checker description. Verified lines 496-502 and 503-509 implement missing and clarify/block blocking.
evidence.why: Spot-check confirms cross-checker evidence accuracy and blocking implementation.

evidence.summary: Test cross-check PRD readiness requires every evidence agent result exists and is accessible. Confirms both agents test evidence accuracy.
evidence.why: Verifies test evidence accessibility and agent accuracy.

evidence.summary: Documentation evidence is accessible. Lines 56-57 explicitly state the blocking policy that both agents independently verified.
evidence.why: Verifies documentation evidence accessibility and policy clarity.

evidence.summary: runDemandEvidenceDispatchRuntime() lines 591-596 show boundary blockers merge into readiness blockers, confirming the evidence dispatch boundary enforcement described.
evidence.why: Verifies evidence dispatch accuracy and boundary enforcement implementation.

risks: If evidence agents collude or fail to execute independently, verification could miss coordinated fabrications
If file system permissions change preventing access to claimed paths, evidence could become inaccessible
If code is refactored after evidence gathering, line number references could become stale

result.notes: Verification confirms evidence quality and sufficiency. Both explorer and cross-checker results meet all protocol requirements: valid scope declarations on all records, concrete paths for project evidence, no assumptions presented as facts, and missing arrays properly empty. Evidence spot-checks confirm path accuracy and source accessibility. Cross-checker explicitly confirmed no conflicts with explorer findings. Both agents independently verified the same blocking conditions with consistent source citations. Evidence is sufficient to support PRD readiness determination.
